Course

Select 6 credits of Japanese language courses:

Select one Japanese linguistics course:

Select one Japanese literature/cultural studies course:

Select one additional 3 credit course from the lists above.

Total Credits

• At least nine of the ﬁfteen hours must be at the 3xx or 4xx level.

• Students must receive a "C-" or better in all courses used for the minor.

• An overall GPA of 2.0 in the minor is required for graduation.

Japanese Minor 1

• No more than 6 of the 15 credits toward the minor may be taken at an institution other than UMCP.
